mapper.sql: FROM attendance_record a INNER JOIN employee e ON a.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN department d ON e.department_id = d.id
mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.employee_id, a.attendance_date, a.check_in_time, a.check_out_time, a.status, a.remark, a.created_at, a.updated_at, e.employee_no, e.name AS employee_name, d.department_name
ORDER BY a.attendance_date DESC, a.id DESC

SELECT id, employee_id, attendance_date, check_in_time, check_out_time, status, remark, created_at, updated_at FROM attendance_record WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND (remark IS NULL OR remark NOT LIKE CONCAT(, '%')) ORDER BY attendance_date DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance_record a INNER JOIN employee e ON a.employee_id = e.id WHERE DATE_FORMAT(a.attendance_date, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth} AND a.status = AND e.status = AND (a.remark IS NULL OR a.remark NOT LIKE CONCAT(, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance_record (employee_id, attendance_date, check_in_time, check_out_time, status, remark) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{attendanceDate}, #{checkInTime}, #{checkOutTime}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance_record SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, attendance_date = #{attendanceDate}, check_in_time = #{checkInTime}, check_out_time = #{checkOutTime}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
